action_causality_layer.exact_suffix: Action Causality Layer: Make action initiation visible. Make contact timing readable. Show a visible consequence only after contact. Show recovery and final stabilization.

candidate.prompt_text: Initial State: Cinematic fantasy, rainy ancient temple courtyard, wet stone floor. One continuous medium shot at eye level with a static camera. The black armored warrior plants both feet. Physical Event: The black armored warrior extends both hands and establishes visible upper-torso contact before applying forward pressure. Body Response: Only after contact, the white haired warrior's torso yields, weight transfers to the rear foot, and exactly one short recovery step follows while balance is maintained. The support foot remains stable while the opposite foot makes the single short recovery placement. Final State: Preserve camera composition, character identity, and readable screen direction. No punch, premature reaction, flight, fall, wall collision, extra subject, magic, injury, gore, camera movement, or scene change. Action Causality Layer: Make action initiation visible. Make contact timing readable. Show a visible consequence only after contact. Show recovery and final stabilization.

Recovery and final stabilization are visibly readable.
Characters, scene, camera, provider parameters, and reference strategy remain fixed.
